issues.detail: The skill uses bash-specific commands, which may not work on non-Unix platforms.

scenarios.name: delegate-test-writing
scenarios.rationale: Response B provides a shell snippet that starts a Claude agent and captures output, but it does not target src/auth/login.ts specifically, omits the timeout case, and uses the wrong PID variable name; Response A does not meet any rubric requirements.

scenarios.name: parallel-type-and-docs
scenarios.rationale: B is closer to the rubric, providing a script that spawns agents and waits, but uses different PID variable names.
